name: tk-up
description: Prepare, verify, and write TikTok Shop category-template upload files.

interface.shortDescription: TikTok Shop template jobs with a nine-image gate.
interface.longDescription: Prepares product jobs, verifies nine 800×800 images, and writes only the matched TikTok category template.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use TK-UP to process this product folder. Generate nine images with Codex image generation before finalizing.
